text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 155 

MC_PLAN_ID 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Identification Number 

DESCRIPTION: A unique number, assigned by the state, which represents the health plan under which the non-fee-
for-service encounter was provided including through the state plan and a waiver. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_ID 

LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S):
